channel.title: Kilberry on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Kilberry on smpaget blog

item.title: Kilberry
item.description:
Had a great time with some young people up at port ban camp site again. This time we were looking at the theme of what do we believe and using various methods and ideas we considered this in relation to life, to God, Jesus and the Holy Spirit In contrast to last years weather w e had a fantastic sunny filled days and gorgeous blue seas. if you were there HI!
If you weren’t also HI! and are interested the Kilberry Bebo page will get all the materials we used up loaded to it as soon as i can do it. technorati tags - kilberry, Merge/XT & youth work

item.title: Kilberry Trip 2007
item.description: (Photo from the Port Ban Camp Website) I have started a Bebo site for BCM, Port Ban, Kilberry Camp. which I led this weekend. It was fun despite the gale force winds and driving rain. It was good to be at the beach, to sit round fires, and get to spend time with new and familiar people. it grows the soul. grows life. allows some fragment of heaven to break through the grime and slime and stuff we put in the way of it. The details of what we did and supporting websites and thoughts will be put up there in the blog for all the young people and leaders who were at the weekend. thanks to all who were there and helped at the weekend.
